title: lycopodioides rupestris
intro: Lycopodioides rupestris, also known as the mountain club moss, is a species of club moss that is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Lycopodioides rupestris include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
